flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Amherst College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.1k → $70.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Amherst College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.1k → $70.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Amherst College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (86.7% → 75.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Amherst College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9% → 0.0%).
